defaultDomain.name: Default Email Domain
defaultDomain.hint: The default domain used when generating email addresses for characters

enableSounds.name: Enable Sound Effects
enableSounds.hint: Play sound effects when opening/closing messages and receiving notifications

enableNotifications.name: Enable Notifications
enableNotifications.hint: Show notifications when receiving new messages

gmCanSendAsAny.name: GM Can Send as Any Character
gmCanSendAsAny.hint: Allow GMs to send messages as any character or create custom senders

messagesPerPage.name: Messages Per Page
messagesPerPage.hint: Number of messages to display per page in the inbox

enableSpamGeneration.name: Enable Spam Generation
enableSpamGeneration.hint: Periodically generate spam messages for a more immersive experience

spamFrequency.name: Spam Frequency
spamFrequency.hint: How often spam messages are generated (in game days)

autoCreateJournals.name: Auto-create Message Journals
autoCreateJournals.hint: Automatically create message journals for new player characters

messageRetention.name: Message Retention Period
messageRetention.hint: Number of days to keep messages in trash before permanent deletion (0 = keep forever)

notifications.messageNotSent: Failed to send message. Please try again.
notifications.requestingPermissions: Requesting message access permissions from GM...
notifications.missingSubject: Please enter a subject for your message.
notifications.missingContent: Please enter content for your message.
notifications.needCharacter: You must have a character assigned to send messages.

dialogs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
